operation.command: apt clean && apt autoremove --purge -y && journalctl --vacuum-time=7d && rm -rf /tmp/* ~/.cache/* && du -sh /var/cache/apt/archives

risk.reason: LLM assessed: This command combines multiple destructive operations: forceful package purging, journal log vacuuming, recursive deletion of all files in /tmp and cache directories without confirmation (-rf), and potential space measurement. The combination of rm -rf with no user confirmation, along with autoremove --purge, could lead to data loss or system instability.
